mapper.insert: insert into bus_schedule_template ( schedule_name, line_id, depart_time, arrive_time, run_start_date, plate_number, vehicle_type, price, seat_total, auto_create, run_mode, assign_dates, interval_day, week_days, keep_days, is_recommend, status, remark, create_user, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{scheduleName}, #{lineId}, #{departTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{runStartDate}, #{plateNumber}, #{vehicleType}, #{price}, #{seatTotal}, #{autoCreate}, #{runMode}, #{assignDates}, #{intervalDay}, #{weekDays}, #{keepDays}, #{isRecommend}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
